message:
chore(beads): close 8w1e (live RDB corpus harvester shipped)

The harvest test live_redis_rdb_corpus_decodes_cleanly proves the
spawn → populate → SAVE → decode_rdb pipeline works end-to-end across
RDB type tags 0/2/4/5/21. The compact-encoding gap surfaced (tags
11/16/17/18/20 not recognized by fr-persist) is filed as
br-frankenredis-aqgx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
